---
title: "Case Study Report"
format: pdf
editor: visual
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: inline
---

```{r, packages}
library(readxl)
library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(knitr)
library(lubridate)
library(naniar)
library(lme4)
```

```{r, load-data}
forcedeck <- read_excel("data/forcedeck.xlsx")
forceframe <- read_excel("data/forceframe.xlsx")
nordbord <- read_excel("data/nordbord.xlsx")
perch <- read_excel("data/perch.xlsx")
```

```{r}
# ---- forcedeck ----
forcedeck_vars <- c(
  "Athlete Id",
  "RSI-modified [m/s]",
  "Peak Landing Force (Left) [N]",
  "Peak Landing Force (Right) [N]",
  "Landing Impulse (Left) [N s]",
  "Landing Impulse (Right) [N s]",
  "Eccentric Deceleration Impulse (Left) [N s]",
  "Eccentric Deceleration Impulse (Right) [N s]"
)

forcedeck_long <- forcedeck |>
  select(all_of(forcedeck_vars)) |>
  pivot_longer(-`Athlete Id`, names_to = "variable", values_to = "value") |>
  group_by(`Athlete Id`, variable) |>
  summarise(var = var(value, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

ggplot(forcedeck_long, aes(x = var)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30, fill = "steelblue", color = "white") +
  facet_wrap(~variable, scales = "free") +
  theme_minimal()

# ---- forceframe ----
forceframe_vars <- c(
  "athleteId",
  "innerRightMaxForce",
  "innerLeftMaxForce",
  "outerRightMaxForce",
  "outerLeftMaxForce"
)

forceframe_long <- forceframe |>
  select(all_of(forceframe_vars)) |>
  pivot_longer(-athleteId, names_to = "variable", values_to = "value") |>
  group_by(athleteId, variable) |>
  summarise(var = var(value, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

ggplot(forceframe_long, aes(x = var)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30, fill = "tomato", color = "white") +
  facet_wrap(~variable, scales = "free") +
  theme_minimal()

# ---- nordbord ----
nordbord_vars <- c(
  "athleteId",
  "rightMaxForce",
  "leftMaxForce"
)

nordbord_long <- nordbord |>
  select(all_of(nordbord_vars)) |>
  pivot_longer(-athleteId, names_to = "variable", values_to = "value") |>
  group_by(athleteId, variable) |>
  summarise(var = var(value, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

ggplot(nordbord_long, aes(x = var)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30, fill = "darkgreen", color = "white") +
  facet_wrap(~variable, scales = "free") +
  theme_minimal()

# ---- perch ----
perch_vars <- c(
  "name",
  "max_peak_power"
)

perch_long <- perch |>
  rename(`Max Peak Power` = max_peak_power) |>
  select(name, `Max Peak Power`) |>
  pivot_longer(-name, names_to = "variable", values_to = "value") |>
  group_by(name, variable) |>
  summarise(var = var(value, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

ggplot(perch_long, aes(x = var)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30, fill = "purple", color = "white") +
  facet_wrap(~variable, scales = "free") +
  theme_minimal()
```
